name: recall_selinux_enforcing_maps_ac3
description: RECALL case — expected to FAIL pre-RAG-rewrite. Models a real eMASS BoE file under 01.AC/ (CTP-008_selinux): a script(1) terminal capture of `sestatus`/`getenforce`. SELinux in enforcing mode with a targeted policy is mandatory-access-control = AC-3 (Access Enforcement) and AC-6 (Least Privilege). The body names NO control ID, NO CCI, NO doc number — it is raw command output with near-zero lexical overlap with NIST control prose ('access enforcement', 'least privilege'). The deterministic tiers (1-4) all miss; the TF-IDF Tier-5 backstop has no shared vocabulary, so the current tagger produces ZERO tags. This is the recall bar the RAG rewrite must clear. Distractor control SI-3 is present so a stray tag would register as a precision miss.

objectives.text: The information system enforces approved authorizations for logical access to information and system resources in accordance with applicable access control policies.
objectives.implementation_guidance: Access enforcement mechanisms restrict subjects to authorized objects.

objectives.text: The organization employs the principle of least privilege, allowing only authorized accesses for users which are necessary to accomplish assigned tasks.
objectives.implementation_guidance: Least privilege confines processes and users to the minimum required access.

objectives.text: The organization employs malicious code protection mechanisms at information system entry and exit points.

evidence.title: CTP-008 SELinux sestatus capture
evidence.text:
Script started on 2026-03-04 09:12:41-0500
[root@app01 ~]# sestatus
SELinux status:                 enabled
SELinuxfs mount:                /sys/fs/selinux
SELinux root directory:         /etc/selinux
Loaded policy name:             targeted
Current mode:                   enforcing
Mode from config file:          enforcing
Policy MLS status:              enabled
Policy deny_unknown status:     denied
Memory protection checking:     actual (secure)
Max kernel policy version:      33
[root@app01 ~]# getenforce
Enforcing
[root@app01 ~]# semodule -l | head
container
staff_u
sysadm_u
unconfined_u
[root@app01 ~]# exit
Script done on 2026-03-04 09:13:02-0500
